exercises.title: Complete Hybrid KEM Implementation
exercises.description: Implement a complete hybrid KEM with proper security properties.
hints: Use HKDF with salt derived from ciphertexts
Include algorithm identifiers in info parameter
Verify derived secrets match on both sides

exercises.title: Hybrid Signature Library
exercises.description: Build a hybrid signature library supporting multiple algorithm combinations.
hints: Verify both signatures before returning true
Include algorithm IDs in serialized output

exercises.title: Security Analysis Report
exercises.description: Analyze the security properties of hybrid constructions.
tasks: Document IND-CCA reduction for hybrid KEM
Document EUF-CMA reduction for hybrid signatures
hints: Consider what breaks if one component is compromised
Reference academic papers on hybrid security

exercises.title: Hybrid Performance Analyzer
exercises.description: Create a tool to analyze hybrid scheme performance overhead.
hints: Consider both time and size overhead
